title: ruta graveolens var. divaricata
intro: Ruta graveolens var. divaricata, also known as Rue or Garden Rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. This plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens var. divaricata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this herb medicinally.
